title: Hwiki: Home

title: CV
content:

- Charlottesville, Virginia (2025 - )
- Advisor: Yong-Yeol Ahn

## Education

- PhD in Physics, KAIST, 2021
- BS in Physics, KAIST, 2013

## Previous Positions

- Postdoctoral Researcher, Indiana University, 2023-2025
- Senior Researcher, Sungkyunkwan University / Institute of Basic Science, 2022-2023
- Researcher / Curat

title: Research
content: My research develops quantitative and interpretable frameworks for **understanding human beliefs, behavior, and creativity**. Across my work, I represent beliefs and cultural expressions as structured entities in high-dimensional spaces and study their relational and geometric properties using large-scale empirical data. By combining **statistical physics, information theory, network science, and modern artificial intelligence, especially large language models and multimodal AI**, and by drawing

title: Byunghwee Lee
content:
Byunghwee Lee (이병휘) is a data scientist and computational social scientist who develops interpretable, quantitative frameworks for understanding human behavior, beliefs, and creativity.

title: 데이터로 본 예술 (1): 황금비율의 비밀 - 정보이론으로 바라본 미술사 속 구도와 비례
content:
### **르네상스 시대 - 구도와 비례에 주목하다** 

서양 미술사는 지배 계급, 종교의 영향력, 생활양식 등 시대적 환경에 따라 지속적인 변화 과정을 거쳤다. 약 5세기부터 15세기까지 긴 시간 동안, 중세 미술은 강한 기독교 문화의 영향 아래 엄격한 규칙에 따라 제작되었다. 중세의 작가들은 인물이나 사물의 현실적 묘사보다는 대상의 상징적인 의미에 초점을 두었다. 예를 들어, 크기나 위치는 인물의 중요성을 나타내기 위해 사용되었고, 각각의 색깔도 특정한 상징적 의미를 지니고 있었다. 따라서 작가들이 개개인의 자유로운 상상력을 펼치거나 새로운 스타일을 창조해 내는데 많은 제약이 있었다.   
   
15세기에 이르러 서양 미술은 새로운 전성기를 맞이한다. 중세의 봉건제도가 붕괴되고 중앙 집권적 국가가 등장하기 시작했으며 새로운 사회 구조와 문화적 분위기가 형성되었다. 1517년 마르틴 루터를 필두로 한 종교개혁이 일어나며 기존의 전통적인 가톨릭 중심의 미술에 대한 반발이 생겨나기

title: Belief Embeddings with Large Language Models
content:
## Citation

Lee, Byunghwee, Rachith Aiyappa, Yong-Yeol Ahn, Haewoon Kwak, and Jisun An. 2025. *A semantic embedding space based on large language models for modelling human beliefs*. *Nature Human Behaviour*.

## Overview

This paper develops a semantic embedding space based on large language models to model human beliefs and positions in public debate. The project connects representation learning with computational social science and provides a framework for studying relative belief structure

title: News Press Landscape and Asymmetric Polarization
content:
## Citation

Lee, Byunghwee, Hyo-sun Ryu, Jae Kook Lee, Hawoong Jeong, and Beom Jun Kim. 2025. *Network analysis reveals news press landscape and asymmetric user polarization*. *Physica A*.

## Overview

This paper studies the structure of the news press landscape and user polarization using network analysis. It reflects my broader interest in media systems, public discourse, and online collective behavior.

## Why I Think It Matters

title: Dissecting Landscape Art History with Information Theory
content:
## Citation

Lee, Byunghwee, Min Kyung Seo, Daniel Kim, In-seob Shin, Maximilian Schich, Hawoong Jeong, and Seung Kee Han. 2020. *Dissecting landscape art history with information theory*. *Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences* 117(43): 26580-26590.

## Overview

This paper uses information-theoretic methods to study long-term changes in the composition of landscape paintings. It is one of the central examples of my work at the intersection of data science, art history, and cultural a

This is a sample public note for a folder-based wiki section.

## Why This Note Exists

I use this page as an example of how to create a new public note inside a new folder in `notes/`.

## Example Structure

- Section entry page: [Travel Notes](travel-list)
